foundation_note: Brief expects SVTK_FOUNDATION_v2.6.0 hash 2e6e8c23d8455d9b964744486be11f0a88684113c1cbc6eb77ec371dc266e467. Repo has v2.8.0 with actual hash ab1b4eb2a50a79ea958246ae6d7373dcaed8c69aebef850dd9adbb09b30826f0. Using v2.8.0 (latest active foundation in repo); v2.6.0 file unavailable.

gaps_admitted.item: Generated NPC names dùng pattern surname+given_name (50 surnames × ~30 given × middle markers)
gaps_admitted.reason: Diverse đủ cho 9562 NPC mới nhưng lore depth per-NPC chưa có ngoài 12 historical figure + protagonist
gaps_admitted.mitigation: CMD DIALOG enrich qua dialog. CMD NPC v2 refine theo nhân vật key.

gaps_admitted.item: Mỗi NPC chỉ thuộc 1 era; chỉ protagonist Trần Long xuyên không multi-era
gaps_admitted.reason: Mass NPC giữ 1 era cho stability + indexing đơn giản
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Special protagonist flag handle riêng; multi-era NPCs need separate registry table.

gaps_admitted.reason: R76/R80 type-tier constraint: only boss/monster/event_npc can be tier 9 → effective cap < 2%
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Trade-off respects R76/R80 semantics. Full 2% would require content design boost monster weight.

gaps_admitted.item: Multi-tier pet evolution not modeled — pet_evolution_path = [idx] only
gaps_admitted.reason: Multi-tier requires separate template entries for evolved forms; out of scope CMD NPC v1.1
gaps_admitted.mitigation: CMD content team add evolved pet templates; cross-link via pet_evolution_path.

gaps_admitted.item: 9 declared extra eras (pre_lich_su, bac_thuoc_g1, hau_le_trinh_nguyen, ...) currently empty
gaps_admitted.reason: Brief declared 9 extras for future expansion; current population uses F-prefix + g1 + 5 main era
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Future CMD NPC v2 populate declared extras when era content design ready.

gaps_admitted.item: skill_ids cross-validate với SKILL_165 registry — chỉ verify range 1..165, không verify ID exists semantically
gaps_admitted.reason: CMD_SKILL ownership; em chỉ tham chiếu range size
gaps_admitted.mitigation: CMD QA-CONTENT cross-ref skill_ids ↔ SKILL_165.jsonl entries.

gaps_admitted.item: sceneId cross-validate với CMD_MAP registry — gen-side range respected 1..7817, semantic biome density per R75 not yet enforced
gaps_admitted.reason: CMD_MAP ownership; em map theo công thức deterministic chưa có biome data
gaps_admitted.mitigation: CMD QA-CONTENT cross-ref sceneId ↔ map registry khi CMD_MAP ship.
